title: Season Preview: Kolkata Knight Riders (21-section editorial + Lab integration)
description: Produce a full 21-section season preview for Kolkata Knight Riders following the approved RCB template (v2.2). Sections: Headline, Story, Off-Season Changes, New Additions, Full Squad Table, Team Style Analysis, Category Ratings, Team Batting Profile, Innings Context, Venue Analysis, Schedule (placeholder), Head-to-Head, Players to Watch, Players Who Need to Step Up, Recent Form (tournament-weighted L10), Data Insights, Bold Take, By the Numbers, Keys to Victory, Scouting Report, Verdict. Production pipeline: (1) Data Assembly from stat pack + analytics views, (2) Virat Kohli editorial draft, (3) Andy Flower domain review (target 9.0+), (4) Jose Mourinho quant scoring (target 8.5+), (5) Lab JS integration in season_previews.js, (6) Tom Brady enforcement pass. Narrative hook: Defending champions under title defense pressure.
